Short Description: Slow Pulled Beef with a Gochujang BBQ Glaze and Roasted Mushrooms and Pickled Cucumbers over Jasmine Rice

Long Description: Seared steak finished with a bold creamy peppercorn sauce, served with charred asparagus over smooth mashed potatoes for a classic, steakhouse inspired plate with a refined, peppery finish.

Long Description: served with roasted bell peppers and roasted broccoli over jasmine rice with shredded purple cabbage and pickled red onion
Dairy: Oven roasted tofu in a rich Thai coconut curry, served with roasted bell peppers and roasted broccoli over jasmine rice with shredded purple cabbage and pickled red onion for a warm, fragrant plate with a creamy, aromatic finish.

Short Description: Our golden high protein and collagen rich turmeric and coconut milk bone broth slow simmered for 24 hours
Long Description: Our golden turmeric and coconut milk bone broth slow simmered for 24 hours with fresh ginger and warming spices.
